context: Checks whether the agent treats repository configuration as the source of truth and separates a necessary fix from an optional platform modernization.

checklist.name: Project versions are authoritative
checklist.description: Reads compiler release/toolchains, wrapper, CI JDK, Quarkus BOM/platform, extension list, and effective dependency graph before selecting APIs.

checklist.name: Rejects forced upgrade
checklist.description: Reverts or excludes the Java 21/compiler upgrade from the local defect fix unless the user explicitly approves a migration.

checklist.name: Exact API/property verification
checklist.description: Verifies that syntax, APIs, annotations, and configuration keys exist and have the asserted phase/semantics in the installed versions.

checklist.name: No random dependency
checklist.description: Uses existing JDK/project facilities when adequate and requires compatibility/security/licensing justification for any new dependency.

checklist.name: Compatible local alternative
checklist.description: Provides a Java 17 and project-Quarkus-compatible implementation that addresses the root cause narrowly.

checklist.name: Separate modernization proposal
checklist.description: Places Java 21/Quarkus upgrade work in an independent, optional plan with migration and rollback gates.

checklist.name: Wrapper/effective graph commands
checklist.description: Names repository-native commands such as wrapper version, effective POM/dependency tree or Gradle toolchains/dependencies, and extension/BOM inspection.

checklist.name: Affected compile/tests
checklist.description: Requires focused compile/tests on the configured JDK and CI-equivalent environment before success claims.

checklist.name: Uncertainty classification
checklist.description: Marks unsupported or unverified version claims as unknown rather than fabricating compatibility.
